name: Oracle
headline: Oracle CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 20.6 / Developing — rotation backfill cycle. May 17 application of 28.4 → 20.6 (-7.8) confirmed working baseline. BOUNDARY CASE: 0.6pt above Critical/Developing (20/21). WARN Act class-action investigation remains active (Strauss Borrelli: Washington 491 workers, Missouri 539 workers). May 18 scan: Oracle privacy settlement ($115M) upheld by 9th Circuit (February 2026) — separate matter from WARN Act, but confirms litigation-as-resolution pattern; not a new May 18 event. No new entity-specific WARN Act outcome in scan window. Confirm at 20.6 with boundary watch sustained.

EMP.rationale: Sustained. WARN Act class-action allegations of inadequate notice on 1,000+ workers (WA + MO) anchor floor-adjacent EMP scoring.

BND.rationale: Sustained. WARN Act statutory-violation allegations ongoing in active litigation.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. Litigation routes engaged; outcomes pending.

evidence.summary: APPLIED_CHANGES.md: Oracle 28.4 → 20.6 applied May 17. Working baseline confirmed.
Strauss Borrelli class-action investigation: Washington 491 workers, Missouri 539 workers — WARN Act inadequate-notice allegations.
Oracle $115M privacy settlement upheld by 9th Circuit (February 2026) — separate from WARN Act; confirms litigation-as-resolution pattern but not a new May 18 event.

keyEvidence: WARN Act class-action investigation active (1,030 workers WA + MO).
9th Circuit privacy settlement upheld (February 2026) — separate matter.
Confirm at 20.6 with boundary watch sustained.
rationale: Rotation backfill cycle. May 17 application 28.4 → 20.6 confirmed working baseline. No new May 18 entity-specific event. Boundary watch sustained. Math: (2.2+1.2+1.8+1.6+1.6+1.8+2.4+2)/8 = 14.6/8 = 1.825 → ((1.825-1)/4)*100 = 20.625 → 20.6.
watches: Oracle Cloud business growth concentration (BND-dimension counterweight)
boundaryWatchResolution: BOUNDARY CASE flagged: 0.6pt above Critical/Developing (20/21). Any single quarter-step EMP or BND dimensional downgrade (e.g., EMP 1.2→1.0 floor; BND 1.6→1.4) could trigger band crossing.

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Carry-forward confirmation. Boundary case flagged.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
